ov_overview_body.en: Six Flags Great America is the premier theme park in the Chicago metropolitan area, located in Gurnee, Illinois, just 40 miles north of downtown Chicago. The park is home to Goliath — a record-breaking RMC wooden coaster holding three world records — and Maxx Force, the fastest launch coaster in the world. With an extraordinary collection of coasters including Raging Bull, Superman Ultimate Flight, X Flight and the legendary American Eagle twin wooden coaster, Six Flags Great America is the greatest thrill destination in the Midwest.
ov_overview_body.es: Six Flags Great America es el parque tematico principal del area metropolitana de Chicago en Gurnee, Illinois. Hogar de Goliath — un coaster RMC con tres records mundiales — y Maxx Force, el coaster de lanzamiento mas rapido del mundo.
ov_overview_body.fr: Six Flags Great America est le parc a themes principal de l aire metropolitaine de Chicago a Gurnee, Illinois. Domine par Goliath — un coaster RMC avec trois records mondiaux — et Maxx Force, le coaster de lancement le plus rapide au monde.
ov_overview_body.de: Six Flags Great America ist der fuhrende Freizeitpark im Grossraum Chicago in Gurnee, Illinois. Heimat von Goliath — einem RMC-Coaster mit drei Weltrekorden — und Maxx Force, dem schnellsten Launch-Coaster der Welt.
ov_overview_body.it: Six Flags Great America e il principale parco a tema dell area metropolitana di Chicago a Gurnee, Illinois. Casa di Goliath — un coaster RMC con tre record mondiali — e Maxx Force, il coaster di lancio piu veloce al mondo.
ov_overview_body.nl: Six Flags Great America is het toonaangevende pretpark in het grootstedelijk gebied Chicago in Gurnee, Illinois. Thuis van Goliath — een RMC achtbaan met drie wereldrecords — en Maxx Force, de snelste launch achtbaan ter wereld.
ov_overview_body.pt: Six Flags Great America e o principal parque tematico da area metropolitana de Chicago em Gurnee, Illinois. Lar de Goliath — um coaster RMC com tres records mundiais — e Maxx Force, o coaster de lancamento mais rapido do mundo.
ov_overview_body.ru: Six Flags Great America — ведущий парк Чикаго в Гарни, Иллинойс. Дом Goliath — три мировых рекорда — и Maxx Force, самый быстрый лаунч в мире.
ov_overview_body.zh: 六旗大美活乐园是詹加哥大都会区首领主题公园，位于俊尼伊州格尔尼市。客居具有三项世界纪录的Goliath和全球最快发射过山车Maxx Force。
ov_overview_body.ar: سيكس فلاجز جريت أميريكا هو متنزه شيكاغو الرائد في جورني، إلينوي. موطن Goliath و Maxx Force.

ov_highlights_body.en: Goliath holds three world records as the tallest fastest and steepest wooden coaster ever built with a beyond-vertical 93-degree drop. Maxx Force is the fastest launch coaster in the world accelerating from 0 to 193 km/h in just 1.8 seconds. Raging Bull is one of the finest hyper coasters in the Midwest. American Eagle is a legendary twin wooden racing coaster beloved since 1981. Great Wolf Lodge next door is the most extraordinary indoor waterpark resort in Illinois. X Flight is one of the most visually spectacular wing coasters in the United States.
ov_highlights_body.es: Goliath tiene tres records mundiales como el coaster de madera mas alto rapido e inclinado con caida de 93 grados. Maxx Force es el coaster de lanzamiento mas rapido del mundo. Raging Bull es uno de los mejores hiper coasters del Medio Oeste. American Eagle es un legendario coaster de madera gemelo.
ov_highlights_body.fr: Goliath detient trois records mondiaux comme le plus haut rapide et pentu en bois avec une chute de 93 degres. Maxx Force est le coaster de lancement le plus rapide au monde. Raging Bull est l un des meilleurs hyper coasters du Midwest. American Eagle est un legendaire coaster en bois jumeau.
ov_highlights_body.de: Goliath halt drei Weltrekorde als hochster schnellster und steilster Holzcoaster mit einem 93-Grad-Abfall. Maxx Force ist der schnellste Launch-Coaster der Welt. Raging Bull ist einer der besten Hyper-Coaster im Midwest. American Eagle ist ein legendarer Twin-Holzcoaster.
ov_highlights_body.it: Goliath detiene tre record mondiali come la montagna russa in legno piu alta veloce e ripida con una caduta di 93 gradi. Maxx Force e il coaster di lancio piu veloce al mondo. Raging Bull e uno dei migliori hyper coaster del Midwest. American Eagle e un leggendario coaster in legno gemello.
ov_highlights_body.nl: Goliath houdt drie wereldrecords als de hoogste snelste en steilste houten achtbaan met een 93-graden val. Maxx Force is de snelste launch achtbaan ter wereld. Raging Bull is een van de beste hyper achtbanen in het Midwest. American Eagle is een legendarische twin houten achtbaan.
ov_highlights_body.pt: Goliath detém tres records mundiais como o mais alto rapido e inclinado coaster de madeira com uma queda de 93 graus. Maxx Force e o coaster de lancamento mais rapido do mundo. Raging Bull e um dos melhores hyper coasters do Midwest.
ov_highlights_body.ru: Goliath — три мировых рекорда. Maxx Force — самый быстрый лаунч. Raging Bull — один из лучших гиперкоастеров.
ov_highlights_body.zh: Goliath创三项世界纪录。0Maxx Force是全球最快的发射过山车。0Raging Bull是中西部最佳超高过山车之一。
ov_highlights_body.ar: Goliath ثلاثة أرقام قياسية عالمية. Maxx Force أسرع launch في العالم.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Six Flags Great America opened in 1976 and was originally built by Marriott Corporation. Goliath opened in 2014 and was the first RMC conversion of a wooden coaster to feature a beyond-vertical drop exceeding 90 degrees. Maxx Force opened in 2019 and accelerates faster than a Formula 1 car off the line. American Eagle was the tallest wooden roller coaster in the world when it opened in 1981. Great Wolf Lodge Gurnee opened adjacent to the park in 2005. The park hosts Fright Fest every October which is one of the most popular Halloween events in the Midwest.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Six Flags Great America abrio en 1976 originalmente construido por Marriott Corporation. Goliath abrio en 2014 con la primera caida mas alla de vertical de 90 grados. Maxx Force abrio en 2019. American Eagle fue el coaster de madera mas alto del mundo en 1981.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: Six Flags Great America a ouvert en 1976 et etait initialement construit par Marriott Corporation. Goliath a ouvert en 2014 avec la premiere chute au-dela de 90 degres. Maxx Force a ouvert en 2019. American Eagle etait le plus haut coaster en bois au monde en 1981.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Six Flags Great America eroffnete 1976 und wurde ursprunglich von Marriott Corporation gebaut. Goliath eroffnete 2014 mit dem ersten uber 90-Grad-Abfall. Maxx Force eroffnete 2019. American Eagle war 1981 der hochste Holzcoaster der Welt.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Six Flags Great America apri nel 1976 originariamente costruito da Marriott Corporation. Goliath apri nel 2014 con la prima caduta oltre i 90 gradi. Maxx Force apri nel 2019. American Eagle era il piu alto coaster in legno al mondo nel 1981.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Six Flags Great America opende in 1976 en werd oorspronkelijk gebouwd door Marriott Corporation. Goliath opende in 2014 met de eerste val boven 90 graden. Maxx Force opende in 2019. American Eagle was in 1981 de hoogste houten achtbaan ter wereld.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Six Flags Great America abriu em 1976 e foi originalmente construido pela Marriott Corporation. Goliath abriu em 2014 com a primeira queda alem de 90 graus. Maxx Force abriu em 2019. American Eagle era o mais alto coaster de madeira do mundo em 1981.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Six Flags Great America открылся в 1976 г. Goliath открылся в 2014 г. Maxx Force в 2019 г. American Eagle был самым высоким в 1981 г.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 六旗大美于1976年开放。Goliath于2014年开放。Maxx Force于2019年开放。美国鹰在1981年是全球最高的木质过山车。
ov_did_you_know_body.ar: Six Flags Great America افتتح 1976. Goliath 2014. Maxx Force 2019. American Eagle كان الأعلى خشبية 1981.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and head straight to Goliath — it builds to long queues quickly. Maxx Force second but check the app as it can have technical delays. Raging Bull is best mid-morning. Superman and X Flight in the afternoon. Flash Pass is strongly recommended on busy days. Great Wolf Lodge guests can walk directly to the park. The park is busiest on summer weekends and Illinois school holidays. Fright Fest in October is spectacular but very busy.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Goliath. Maxx Force segundo pero puede tener retrasos tecnicos. Raging Bull es mejor a media manana. Flash Pass muy recomendado en dias concurridos.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l ouverture et allez directement a Goliath. Maxx Force deuxieme mais peut avoir des retards techniques. Raging Bull est mieux en milieu de matinee. Flash Pass fortement recommande les jours charges.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie direkt zu Goliath. Maxx Force zweiter aber kann technische Verzogerungen haben. Raging Bull am besten vormittags. Flash Pass dringend empfohlen.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva all apertura e vai direttamente a Goliath. Maxx Force secondo ma puo avere ritardi tecnici. Raging Bull e meglio a meta mattina. Flash Pass fortemente consigliato.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening en ga direct naar Goliath. Maxx Force tweede maar kan technische vertragingen hebben. Raging Bull het best midden in de ochtend. Flash Pass sterk aanbevolen.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai directamente a Goliath. Maxx Force segundo mas pode ter atrasos tecnicos. Raging Bull e melhor a meio da manha. Flash Pass fortemente recomendado.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. Goliath — первым. Flash Pass рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往Goliath。Maxx Force第二但可能有技术延误。建议Flash Pass。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ Goliath. Flash Pass موصى به.

ov_photos_body.en: Goliath photographed during the beyond-vertical 93-degree drop with riders screaming against the Illinois sky is the defining image of Six Flags Great America. Maxx Force photographed at the moment of launch with the incredible acceleration visible is extraordinary. Raging Bull photographed along the lakeside with the 58-metre drop reflected in the water is spectacular. The park photographed from above showing Goliath American Eagle and Raging Bull in one frame is breathtaking. American Eagle photographed during the racing moment when both trains are side by side is iconic.
ov_photos_body.es: Goliath fotografiado durante la caida de 93 grados es la imagen definitiva. Maxx Force en el momento del lanzamiento es extraordinario. Raging Bull junto al lago es espectacular.
ov_photos_body.fr: Goliath photographie pendant la chute de 93 degres est l image definitive. Maxx Force au moment du lancement est extraordinaire. Raging Bull le long du lac est spectaculaire.
ov_photos_body.de: Goliath beim 93-Grad-Abfall ist das definitive Bild. Maxx Force beim Startmoment ist aussergewohnlich. Raging Bull am See ist spektakular.
ov_photos_body.it: Goliath fotografato durante la caduta di 93 gradi e l immagine definitiva. Maxx Force al momento del lancio e straordinario. Raging Bull lungo il lago e spettacolare.
ov_photos_body.nl: Goliath gefotografeerd tijdens de 93-graden val is het definitieve beeld. Maxx Force op het startmoment is buitengewoon. Raging Bull langs het meer is spectaculair.
ov_photos_body.pt: Goliath fotografado durante a queda de 93 graus e a imagem definitiva. Maxx Force no momento do lancamento e extraordinario. Raging Bull ao longo do lago e espetacular.
ov_photos_body.zh: Goliath在93度下坡时的拍摄是六旗大美乐园的标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Goliath أثناء الانحدار هو الصورة المحددة.

desc.en: Popular American grill with classic burgers, grilled chicken and sides. Convenient quick-service.

desc.en: Most beloved sweet treat — legendary deep-fried funnel cakes with powdered sugar, strawberries or Nutella. Quintessential park dessert.
desc.es: El dulce mas querido — legendarios funnel cakes con azucar glas, fresas o Nutella.

desc.pt: O doce mais amado — lendarios funnel cakes com acucar em po, morangos ou Nutella.
desc.zh: 最受欢迎的甜食——传奇漏斗蛋糕。
desc.ar: أكثر حلوى محبوبة — funnel cakes أسطورية.

desc.en: Most extraordinary family resort next door — massive indoor waterpark with themed suites. Best family experience near any Chicago theme park.
